title: crotalaria ferruginea var. pilosissima
intro: Crotalaria ferruginea var. pilosissima, also known as the hairy crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems. Crotalaria ferruginea var. pilosissima is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and effectiveness.
